# WI-QUIC-CRT-0032 - QUIC core diagnostics sink and per-connection resolution work item

## Summary

Add a typed, connection-scoped diagnostics contract in Incursa.Quic and resolve diagnostics once per connection so disabled paths stay cheap.

## Requirements Addressed

- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0134
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0135

## Design Inputs

- ARC-QUIC-CRT-0032

## Planned Changes

- Refine `QuicDiagnostics.cs` into a typed, connection-scoped diagnostics contract with a null sink.
- Thread the resolved sink through `QuicClientConnectionHost`, `QuicListenerHost`, and `QuicConnectionRuntime`.
- Keep the disabled path to a direct no-op branch with no qlog or serializer dependency.
- Add focused tests for disabled sink behavior and per-connection targeting once the implementation lands.

## Out of Scope

- qlog builder mapping
- trace or file serialization
- harness QLOGDIR plumbing
- transport scheduling changes

## Verification Plan

Run requirement-home tests for the typed diagnostics contract and per-connection resolution, benchmark the disabled emission path, and inspect assembly references to confirm `Incursa.Quic` remains free of qlog packages.

## Completion Notes

Implemented the typed transport diagnostics contract in Incursa.Quic, threaded the resolved null sink through the client and listener runtime setup paths, and kept the disabled path on a cached no-op branch. Focused requirement-home and integration tests for the diagnostics seam passed; benchmark evidence and package dependency inspection remain part of the verification shell.

## Trace Links

Addresses:

- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0134
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0135

Uses Design:

- ARC-QUIC-CRT-0032

Verified By:

- VER-QUIC-CRT-0032

## Scope

This slice covers only the core diagnostics sink and its per-connection resolution points. It does not add qlog builders or file emission to Incursa.Quic.
